The Trainee Sexologist Season 2 Episode 2: The Secret Sex World Happening Right In Front of You

We chat with a Sex Party Organiser to find out exactly how freaky things get, listen out for the bit where Shaz gets told off! We ask Miss C all the questions you've ever wanted to know about her job as a sex worker.

  1. Introduction
  2. The ins and outs of Sex Parties
  3. Survey Results!
  4. Interview with Miss C
  5. Outro

  • Sex Workers of Aotearoa Exhibition - https://www.swoa.co.nz/swoa-2021-join-us 
  • Find us on Instagram - @TraineeSexologist 
  • Morgan's website - www.morganpenn.co.nz
